[28C[3A]0;⠂ Claude Code[28D[3B[4A[100m[37m❯ [97mYou are helping me scaffold a backend technical test project.[39m                                                                                                                                                       [1B                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [1B  [97mRequirements:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [1B  [97m- Use Node.js with TypeScript[39m                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Use Jest for testing[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- Keep the setup lightweight and production-like[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Avoid unnecessary abstractions or frameworks[39m                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Prefer simplicity and readability over cleverness[39m                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mTasks:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m1. Initialize a Node.js + TypeScript project in the root folder[39m                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m2. Configure Jest for TypeScript[39m                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m3. Create a sensible folder structure for a small backend library project[39m                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m4. Create a `.gitignore` for Node.js/TypeScript projects[39m                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m5. Create a `README.md` that includes:[39m                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m   - project purpose[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m   - setup instructions[39m                                                                                                                                                                                             [49m

[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m

[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m

[100m  [97m- Do not add unnecessary frameworks or abstractions.[39m                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- Optimise for maintainability and testability. - Avoid introducing abstractions for features that are not currently required.[39m                                                                                      [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 1 requirement:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97mCalculate delivery cost based on parcel size.[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mPricing rules:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Small parcel: all dimensions < 10cm, cost $3[39m                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Medium parcel: all dimensions < 50cm, cost $8[39m                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- Large parcel: all dimensions < 100cm, cost $15[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- XL parcel: any dimension >= 100cm, cost $25[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 1 assumptions:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- The library accepts an order containing one or more parcels.[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Each parcel has a list of dimensions represented as positive numbers.[39m                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- Dimensions are provided in centimetres.[39m                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- The implementation should not assume fixed dimension names like length, width, and height.[39m                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- At least one dimension is required per parcel.[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Boundary values move into the next category:[39m                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- 10cm is medium[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- 50cm is large[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- 100cm is XL[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Invalid input should throw a clear validation error.[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m

[100m  [97m- small parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- medium parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m

[28C[3A]0;⠐ Claude Code[28D[3B[4A[100m[37m❯ [97mPlease be my thought partner, don’t be agreeable and ask one question at the time if you need clarification. [39m                                                                                                       [1B                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [1B  [97mProject context:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [1B  [97mI am building a Node.js + TypeScript + Jest library for a courier company.[39m                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97mThe library calculates the cost of sending an order of parcels.[39m                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97mThis is a library only — no CLI, HTTP server, database, or UI.[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mGeneral output requirement:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97mThe output should include:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- a collection of line items, each with a type and cost[39m                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- one line item per parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- the total order cost[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mImportant constraints:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- Keep the solution simple, readable, and well tested.[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- Do not add unnecessary frameworks or abstractions.[39m                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- Optimise for maintainability and testability. - Avoid introducing abstractions for features that are not currently required.[39m                                                                                      [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 1 requirement:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97mCalculate delivery cost based on parcel size.[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mPricing rules:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Small parcel: all dimensions < 10cm, cost $3[39m                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Medium parcel: all dimensions < 50cm, cost $8[39m                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- Large parcel: all dimensions < 100cm, cost $15[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- XL parcel: any dimension >= 100cm, cost $25[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 1 assumptions:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- The library accepts an order containing one or more parcels.[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Each parcel has a list of dimensions represented as positive numbers.[39m                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- Dimensions are provided in centimetres.[39m                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- The implementation should not assume fixed dimension names like length, width, and height.[39m                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- At least one dimension is required per parcel.[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Boundary values move into the next category:[39m                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- 10cm is medium[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- 50cm is large[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- 100cm is XL[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Invalid input should throw a clear validation error.[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mTasks:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m1. Define clear TypeScript types for:[39m                                                                                                                                                                               [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel input[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel type[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- priced line item[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m- order pricing result[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m2. Implement Step 1 pricing logic.[39m                                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m3. Add Jest tests covering green paths:[39m                                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- small parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- medium parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- large parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- XL parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97m- multiple parcels in one order[39m                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- total order cost[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m4. Add Jest tests covering red paths:[39m                                                                                                                                                                               [49m
[100m  [97m- empty parcel list[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel with no dimensions[39m                                                                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97m- zero dimension[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- negative dimension[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- non-numeric dimension if relevant to TypeScript/runtime validation[39m                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m5. Add Jest tests covering boundary cases:[39m                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- dimension exactly 10cm[39m                                                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- dimension exactly 50cm[39m                                                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- dimension exactly 100cm [39m                                                                                                                                                                                          [49m

[100m  [97m- Medium parcel: all dimensions < 50cm, cost $8[39m                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- Large parcel: all dimensions < 100cm, cost $15[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- XL parcel: any dimension >= 100cm, cost $25[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 1 assumptions:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- The library accepts an order containing one or more parcels.[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Each parcel has a list of dimensions represented as positive numbers.[39m                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- Dimensions are provided in centimetres.[39m                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- The implementation should not assume fixed dimension names like length, width, and height.[39m                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- At least one dimension is required per parcel.[39m                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Boundary values move into the next category:[39m                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- 10cm is medium[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- 50cm is large[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- 100cm is XL[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Invalid input should throw a clear validation error.[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mTasks:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m1. Define clear TypeScript types for:[39m                                                                                                                                                                               [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel input[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel type[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- priced line item[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m- order pricing result[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m2. Implement Step 1 pricing logic.[39m                                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m3. Add Jest tests covering green paths:[39m                                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- small parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- medium parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- large parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- XL parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97m- multiple parcels in one order[39m                                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- total order cost[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m4. Add Jest tests covering red paths:[39m                                                                                                                                                                               [49m
[100m  [97m- empty parcel list[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel with no dimensions[39m                                                                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97m- zero dimension[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- negative dimension[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- non-numeric dimension if relevant to TypeScript/runtime validation[39m                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m5. Add Jest tests covering boundary cases:[39m                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- dimension exactly 10cm[39m                                                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- dimension exactly 50cm[39m                                                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- dimension exactly 100cm [39m                                                                                                                                                                                          [49m

[1C[34mexport[1Cconst[1C[39mORDER_ADDON[1C=[1C{
[3C[36mSPEEDY_SHIPPING[39m:[1C[31m'SPEEDY_SHIPPING'[39m,

[1C[1mPricing[1C([94msrc/pricing.ts[39m)[22m

[1CKeep[1Cparcel[1Cclassification[1Cuntouched.[1CAfter[1Cbuilding[1Cparcel[1Cline[1Citems,[1Cconditionally[1Cappend[1Ca[1Cspeedy[1Cline[1Citem,[1Cthen[1Csum.

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mparcelLineItems:[1CPricedLineItem[][1C=[1Corder.parcels.map(...);[1C[32m//[1Cunchanged[39m
[1C[34mconst[1C[39mparcelSubtotal[1C=[1CparcelLineItems.reduce([33m([39ms,[1Ci)[1C=>[1Cs[1C+[1Ci.cost,[1C[32m0[39m);

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mlineItems:[1CPricedLineItem[][1C=[1Corder.speedyShipping
[3C?[1C[...parcelLineItems,[1C{[1C[36mtype[39m:[1CORDER_ADDON.SPEEDY_SHIPPING,[1C[36mcost[39m:[1CparcelSubtotal[1C}]
[3C:[1CparcelLineItems;

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mtotal[1C=[1ClineItems.reduce([33m([39ms,[1Ci)[1C=>[1Cs[1C+[1Ci.cost,[1C[32m0[39m);

[1CNo[1Cnew[1Cconstant[1Cfor[1Cthe[1Cmultiplier[1C—[1Cthe[1Cspeedy[1Ccost[1Cis[1Cliterally[1Cthe[1Csubtotal,[1Cnot[1C[94msubtotal[1C*[1CN[39m.[1CIntroducing[1C[94mSPEEDY_SHIPPING_MULTIPLIER[1C=[1C1[1C[39mwould[1Cbe[1Ca[1Cmagic-number[1Critual[1Cwith[1Cno[1Cpayoff.

[28C[3A]0;⠂ add-speedy-shipping-option[28D[3B[4A[100m[37m❯ [97mBe my thought partner, don’t be agreeable. Ask one question at the time if you need clarification:  [39m                                                                                                                [1B  [97mYou are helping me continue implementing a backend technical test.[39m                                                                                                                                                  [1B                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [1B  [97mProject context:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97mI am building a Node.js + TypeScript + Jest library for a courier company.[39m                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97mThe library calculates the cost of sending an order of parcels.[39m                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mThis is a library only:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- no CLI[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- no HTTP server[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- no database[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- no UI[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mCurrent implementation status:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 1 is implemented:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel pricing based on dimensions[39m                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- parcel type classification[39m                                                                                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- runtime validation[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- order total calculation[39m                                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 2 is implemented:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- optional speedy shipping[39m                                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- speedy shipping is an order-level adjustment line item[39m                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- speedy shipping cost equals the parcel subtotal[39m                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- speedy shipping does not modify individual parcel line items[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 3 requirement:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97mA weight limit has been added for each parcel type.[39m                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97mIf a parcel is over the weight limit for its parcel type, an extra charge applies.[39m                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mRules:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- Overweight charge is $2 per kg over the weight limit[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- Small parcel weight limit: 1kg[39m                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Medium parcel weight limit: 3kg[39m                                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- Large parcel weight limit: 6kg[39m                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- XL parcel weight limit: 10kg[39m                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mImplementation expectations:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- Add `weight` to each parcel input[39m                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- `weight` should be required on every parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Weight is provided in kilograms[39m                                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- Weight must be a positive finite number[39m                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- Treat adding required `weight` as an intentional input contract change introduced by Step 3[39m                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Update existing tests and fixtures so all valid parcels include weight[39m                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- Determine parcel type from dimensions first[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Then calculate any overweight charge based on that parcel type[39m                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Weight limits are inclusive[39m                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m- Partial kilograms over the limit should be rounded up[39m                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- Add overweight charges to the individual parcel line item cost[39m                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- Overweight charges should not be separate line items[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- The parcel line item `cost` should include base parcel price plus any overweight charge[39m                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- Keep speedy shipping as an order-level adjustment[39m                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- If speedy shipping is selected, calculate it after parcel line items include overweight charges[39m                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mExamples:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- A small parcel weighing 1kg has no overweight charge[39m                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- A small parcel weighing 1.1kg is charged as 1kg overweight, so it adds $2[39m                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97m- A small parcel weighing 2.1kg is 1.1kg over the limit, rounded up to 2kg overweight, so it adds $4[39m                                                                                                                [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mTasks:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m1. Update the parcel input type to include required `weight`[39m                                                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m2. Update validation to require valid parcel weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m3. Implement overweight charge calculation[39m                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m4. Update parcel line item costs to include overweight charges[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m5. Ensure speedy shipping still works correctly after overweight charges[39m                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m6. Add Jest tests covering green paths:[39m                                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m   - parcel under weight limit[39m                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m   - parcel exactly at weight limit[39m                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m   - parcel over weight limit[39m                                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m   - partial kg overweight rounds up[39m                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m   - multiple parcels with different overweight charges[39m                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m   - speedy shipping after overweight charges[39m                                                                                                                                                                       [49m
[100m  [97m7. Add Jest tests covering red paths:[39m                                                                                                                                                                               [49m
[100m  [97m   - missing weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m   - zero weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m   - negative weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m   - non-finite weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m8. For the missing weight runtime validation test, use `@ts-expect-error` or an explicit cast to simulate invalid JavaScript input[39m                                                                                  [49m
[100m  [97m9. Keep the implementation simple and focused only on Step 3 requirements[39m                                                                                                                                           [49m

[2C[3A]0;✳ add-speedy-shipping-option[2D[3B[6A[96m──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[1C[1B[94m[1mReady to code?[1B[22m[39m[K[1B Here[1Cis[1CClaude's[1Cplan:[1B[37m╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌[1C[1B[39m[1m[3m[4mStep 3 — Parcel weight & overweight charges[24m[23m[22m[K

[1C[1mContext[22m

[1CSteps[1C1–2[1Cship:[1Cparcel-size[1Cpricing[1C+[1Coptional[1Cspeedy[1Cshipping[1Cas[1Can[1Corder-level[1Caddon.[1C33[1Ctests,[1C100%[1Ccoverage.

[1CStep[1C3[1Cadds[1C[1mweight[1C[22mto[1Cevery[1Cparcel[1Cas[1Ca[1Crequired[1Cinput,[1Cand[1Can[1C[1moverweight[1Csurcharge[1C[22mwhen[1Ca[1Cparcel[1Cexceeds[1Cits[1Ctype's[1Cweight[1Climit.[1CPer[1Cthe[1Cbrief:

[1C-[1CWeight[1Cis[1Crequired[1C(kg,[1Cpositive,[1Cfinite).[1CThe[1Ccontract[1Cchange[1Cis[1Cintentional[1C—[1Cevery[1Cexisting[1Cvalid[1Cparcel[1Cfixture[1Cin[1Ctests[1Cgets[1Ca[1C[94mweight[1C[39madded.
[1C-[1CWeight[1Climits[1C(inclusive)[1Cper[1Ctype:[1CSMALL[1C1,[1CMEDIUM[1C3,[1CLARGE[1C6,[1CXL 10.
[1C-[1COverweight[1Ccharge:[1C[94m$2[1C×[1Cceil(weight[1C−[1Climit)[1C[39mkg[1Cover.[1CSo[1C1.1kg[1Cin[1Ca[1CSMALL[1C=[1C[94mceil(0.1)[1C×[1C$2[1C[39m=[1C$2[1Csurcharge.
[1C-[1CSurcharge[1Cis[1Cfolded[1Cinto[1Cthe[1C[1mparcel[1Cline[1Citem's[1C[94mcost[1C[22m[39m—[1Cnot[1Ca[1Cseparate[1Cline[1Citem.[1CThe[1Coutput[1Cshape[1Cdoes[1Cnot[1Cchange.
[1C-[1CParcel[1Ctype[1Cis[1Cstill[1Cclassified[1Cfrom[1Cdimensions[1Conly.[1CWeight[1Cdoes[1Cnot[1Caffect[1Cclassification.
[1C-[1CSpeedy[1Cshipping[1Cstays[1Can[1Corder-level[1Caddon,[1Ccomputed[1C[3mafter[1C[23mparcel[1Cline[1Citems[1Cinclude[1Ctheir[1Csurcharges.[1CThe[1Cexisting[1Cimplementation[1Calready[1Cdoes[1Csubtotal-then-speedy,[1Cso[1Cthis[1Cfalls[1Cout[1Cfor[1Cfree.

[1C[1mApproach[22m

[1C[1mTypes[1C([94msrc/types.ts[39m)[22m

[1COne[1Cfield[1Cadded[1Cto[1C[94mParcel[39m:

[1C[34mexport[1Cinterface[1C[39mParcel[1C{
[3C[36mdimensions[39m:[1C[36mnumber[39m[];
[3Cweight:[1C[36mnumber[39m;[1C[32m//[1Ckg,[1Crequired,[1Cpositive,[1Cfinite[39m
[1C}

[1CNo[1Cnew[1Cconstants,[1Cno[1Cchanges[1Cto[1C[94mPARCEL_SIZE[39m,[1C[94mORDER_ADDON[39m,[1C[94mLineItemType[39m,[1C[94mPricedLineItem[39m,[1Cor[1C[94mOrder[39m.

[1C[1mPricing[1C([94msrc/pricing.ts[39m)[22m

[1CAdd[1Ctwo[1Cconstants[1Calongside[1C[94mPARCEL_PRICES[39m:

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mPARCEL_WEIGHT_LIMITS_KG:[1CRecord<ParcelSize,[1C[36mnumber[39m>[1C=[1C{
[3C[36mSMALL[39m:[1C[32m1[39m,
[3C[36mMEDIUM[39m:[1C[32m3[39m,
[3C[36mLARGE[39m:[1C[32m6[39m,
[3C[36mXL[39m:[1C[32m10[39m,
[1C};
[1C[34mconst[1C[39mOVERWEIGHT_RATE_PER_KG[1C=[1C[32m2[39m;

[1CA[1Csmall[1Chelper[1Cto[1Ccompute[1Cthe[1Csurcharge:

[1C[34mfunction[33m [39moverweightCharge(weightKg:[1C[36mnumber[33m,[1Csize:[1CParcelSize[39m):[1Cnumber[1C{
[3C[34mconst[1C[39mexcess[1C=[1C[36mMath[39m.max([32m0[39m,[1CweightKg[1C-[1CPARCEL_WEIGHT_LIMITS_KG[size]);
[3C[34mreturn[1C[36mMath[39m.ceil(excess)[1C*[1COVERWEIGHT_RATE_PER_KG;
[1C}

[1C[94mMath.max(0,[1C…)[1C[39mprotects[1Cagainst[1Cunder-limit[1Cweights;[1C[94mMath.ceil[1C[39mrounds[1Cpartial[1Ckg[1Cup;[1Cat-exact-limit[1Cgives[1C[94mexcess[1C=[1C0[1C[39m→[1C[94m$0[39m.

[1CUpdate[1Cthe[1Cparcel-line-item[1Cconstruction[1Cinside[1C[94mpriceOrder[39m:

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mparcelLineItems:[1CPricedLineItem[][1C=[1Corder.parcels.map([33m([39mparcel)[1C=>[1C{
[3C[34mconst[1C[39msize[1C=[1CclassifyParcel(parcel);
[3C[34mconst[1C[39mcost[1C=[1CPARCEL_PRICES[size][1C+[1CoverweightCharge(parcel.weight,[1Csize);
[3C[34mreturn[1C[39m{[1C[36mtype[39m:[1Csize,[1Ccost[1C};
[1C});

[1CEverything[1Cafter[1Cthis[1Cpoint[1C—[1C[94mparcelSubtotal[39m,[1Cspeedy-line-item[1Cappend,[1C[94mtotal[1C[39mreduce[1C—[1Cis[1Cunchanged.[1CSpeedy[1Ccorrectness[1Cis[1Cautomatic:[1Cthe[1Csubtotal[1Cnow[1Creflects[1Csurcharged[1Cparcels,[1Cso[1Cthe[1Cspeedy[1Cline[1Citem[1Cdoubles
[1Cthe[1Cright[1Cnumber.

[1C[1mValidation[1C([94msrc/pricing.ts[39m)[22m

[1CAdd[1Ca[1C[94mvalidateWeight[1C[39msibling[1Cto[1C[94mvalidateDimension[39m,[1Ccalled[1Conce[1Cper[1Cparcel[1Cfrom[1C[94mvalidateParcel[39m.[1CFollow[1Cthe[1Cexisting[1Ctwo-check[1Cpattern[1C(separate[1C"finite[1Cnumber"[1Cand[1C"greater[1Cthan[1Czero"[1Cmessages)[1Cso[1Cnew[1Cred-path
[1Ctests[1Cmirror[1Cthe[1Cexisting[1Cdimension[1Cred-path[1Cshape:

[1C[34mfunction[33m [39mvalidateWeight(weight:[1C[36mnumber[33m,[1CparcelIndex:[1C[36mnumber[39m):[1Cvoid[1C{
[3C[34mif[1C[39m([34mtypeof[1C[39mweight[1C!==[1C[31m'number'[1C[39m||[1C![36mNumber[39m.isFinite(weight))[1C{
[5C[34mthrow[1Cnew[1C[39mValidationError(
[7C[31m`Parcel[1Cat[1Cindex[1C[39m${[36mString[31m(parcelIndex)}[1C[39mhas[1Cinvalid[1Cweight:[1Cmust[1Cbe[1Ca[1Cfinite[1Cnumber`,
[5C);
[3C}
[3C[34mif[1C[39m(weight[1C<=[1C[32m0[39m)[1C{
[5C[34mthrow[1Cnew[1C[39mValidationError(
[7C[31m`Parcel[1Cat[1Cindex[1C[39m${[36mString[31m(parcelIndex)}[1C[39mhas[1Cinvalid[1Cweight:[1Cmust[1Cbe[1Cgreater[1Cthan[1Czero`,
[5C);
[3C}
[1C}

[1CI[1Cdeliberately[1Cdo[1C[1mnot[1C[22mextract[1Ca[1Cshared[1C[94misPositiveFinite[1C[39mpredicate.[1CThe[1Ctwo[1Ccallers[1Cthrow[1Cdistinct[1Cmessages[1Cand[1Cthe[1Cexisting[1Ctests[1Cassert[1Con[1Cthose[1Cmessages[1C—[1Ccollapsing[1Cnow[1Cwould[1Cforce[1Ca[1Cchurn-y[1Ctests[1Crewrite[1Cthat
[2Cisn't[1Cpart[1Cof[1CStep[1C3's[1Cscope.[1CTwo[1Cnear-duplicate[1Cvalidators[1Cis[1Cthe[1Clesser[1Cevil[1Chere.

[1C[1mFiles[1Cto[1Cchange[22m

[1C┌───────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
[1C│[13CPath[14C│[85CChange[85C│
[1C├───────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
[1C│[1C[94msrc/types.ts[18C[39m│[1CAdd[1Crequired[1C[94mweight:[1Cnumber[1C[39mto[1C[94mParcel[39m.[137C│
[1C├───────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
[1C│[1C[94msrc/pricing.ts[16C[39m│[1CAdd[1C[94mPARCEL_WEIGHT_LIMITS_KG[39m,[1C[94mOVERWEIGHT_RATE_PER_KG[39m,[1C[94moverweightCharge()[39m,[1C[94mvalidateWeight()[39m.[1CFold[1Csurcharge[1Cinto[1Cparcel[1Cline-item[1C[94mcost[39m.[1CCall[1C[94mvalidateWeight[1C[39mfrom[1C[94mvalidateParcel[39m.[1C│
[1C├───────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
[1C│[1C[94msrc/__tests__/pricing.test.ts[1C[39m│[1CAdd[1C[94mweight:[1C<under-limit[1Cvalue>[1C[39mto[1Cevery[1Cexisting[1Cvalid[1Cparcel[1Cfixture[1C(mechanical;[1Ckeeps[1Cexisting[1Cassertions[1Cintact).[1CAdd[1Ca[1Cnew[1C[94mdescribe('overweight[1Ccharges')[1C[39mblock[1Ccovering[1C│
[1C│[31C│[2Cgreen[1C/[1Cboundary[1C/[1Cred[1Cpaths.[1CAdd[1Cone[1Ctest[1Cfor[1Cspeedy[1C+[1Coverweight.[107C│
[1C└───────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

[1CNo[1Cchanges[1Cto[1C[94msrc/errors.ts[39m,[1C[94msrc/index.ts[39m,[1Cor[1C[94msrc/__tests__/index.test.ts[1C[39m(the[1Cindex[1Ctest[1Cdoesn't[1Cconstruct[1Cparcels).[1CNo[1Cnew[1Cfiles.[1C[94mclassifyParcel[1C[39mis[1Cuntouched[1C—[1Cweight[1Cdoes[1Cnot[1Cfactor[1Cinto[1Cclassification.

[1C[1mFixture[1Cupdate[1Cstrategy:[1C[22mevery[1Cexisting[1Cparcel[1Cgets[1C[94mweight:[1C1[39m.[1CThat's[1C≤[1Cthe[1CSMALL[1Climit[1C(1)[1Cand[1Cwell[1Cunder[1CMEDIUM/LARGE/XL[1Climits,[1Cso[1Czero[1Cparcels[1Cbecome[1Csurcharged[1Cand[1Call[1Cexisting[1Cassertions[1Cpass[1Cunchanged.

[1C[1mTests[1Cto[1Cadd[1C([94msrc/__tests__/pricing.test.ts[39m)[22m

[1CNew[1C[94mdescribe('overweight[1Ccharges')[1C[39mblock[1Cwith[1Cthe[1Cstandard[1Cgreen/boundary/red[1Csub-layout:

[1C[1mGreen[1Cpaths:[22m
[1C1.[1CParcel[1Cunder[1Cweight[1Climit[1C→[1Cno[1Csurcharge[1C(SMALL[1C@[1C0.5kg[1C=[1C$3).
[1C2.[1CParcel[1Cexactly[1Cat[1Cweight[1Climit[1C→[1Cno[1Csurcharge[1C(SMALL[1C@[1C1kg[1C=[1C$3;[1Cone[1Cassertion[1Cper[1Ctype).
[1C3.[1CParcel[1Cover[1Cweight[1Climit[1C→[1Csurcharge[1Capplied[1C(SMALL[1C@[1C1.1kg[1C=[1C$5;[1Cthe[1Cbrief's[1Cexample[1C#2).
[1C4.[1CPartial[1Ckg[1Cover[1Crounds[1Cup[1C(SMALL[1C@[1C2.1kg[1C=[1C$7;[1Cthe[1Cbrief's[1Cexample[1C#3).
[1C5.[1CMultiple[1Cparcels[1Cwith[1Cdifferent[1Csurcharges[1Cin[1Cone[1Corder[1C—[1Cassert[1Ceach[1Cline[1Citem's[1Ccost[1Cindividually.
[1C6.[1CSpeedy[1Cshipping[1Cafter[1Coverweight:[1CSMALL[1C@[1C2.1kg[1Cwith[1C[94mspeedyShipping:[1Ctrue[1C[39m→[1Cparcel[1C$7,[1Cspeedy[1C$7,[1Ctotal[1C$14.

[1C[1mBoundary[1Ccases:[22m
[1C7.[1CEach[1Cparcel[1Ctype[1Cat[1Cits[1Cexact[1Climit[1C(MEDIUM[1C@[1C3kg,[1CLARGE[1C@[1C6kg,[1CXL[1C@[1C10kg)[1C→[1Cbase[1Cprice,[1Cno[1Csurcharge.
[1C8.[1CJust-over[1Cfor[1Ceach[1Ctype[1C(MEDIUM[1C@[1C3.001kg[1C→[1C+$2,[1Cetc.)[1C—[1Cconfirms[1Cinclusive[1Climit[1C+[1Cceil[1Cfor[1Cevery[1Ctype.

[1C[1mRed[1Cpaths:[22m
[1C9.[1CMissing[1Cweight[1Cat[1Cruntime[1C(use[1C[94m@ts-expect-error[1C[39mto[1Cbypass[1Cthe[1Ctype[1Csystem)[1C→[1CValidationError[1C/finite[1Cnumber/.
[1C10.[1CZero[1Cweight[1C→[1C/greater[1Cthan[1Czero/.
[1C11.[1CNegative[1Cweight[1C→[1C/greater[1Cthan[1Czero/.
[1C12.[1CNaN[1Cweight[1C→[1C/finite[1Cnumber/.
[1C13.[1CInfinity[1Cweight[1C→[1C/finite[1Cnumber/.
[1C14.[1CError[1Cmessage[1Cincludes[1Cthe[1Coffending[1Cparcel[1Cindex[1C(mirrors[1Cthe[1Cexisting[1Cdimension[1Cindex[1Ctest).

[1C[1mVerification[22m

[1C1.[1C[94mnpm[1Crun[1Ctypecheck[1C[39m—[1Cclean.[1CThe[1Crequired[1C[94mweight[1C[39mwill[1Ccompile-fail[1Cany[1Ctest[1Cfixture[1Cmissing[1Cit;[1Cthat's[1Cthe[1Ccontract-change[1Csignal.
[1C2.[1C[94mnpm[1Crun[1Clint[1C[39m—[1Cclean.
[1C3.[1C[94mnpm[1Ctest[1C[39m—[1Call[1Cexisting[1Ctests[1Cpass[1C(after[1C[94mweight:[1C1[1C[39mis[1Cadded[1Cto[1Cfixtures)[1Cplus[1Cnew[1Coverweight[1Ctests[1Cpass.[1CExpect[1C~47[1Ctests[1Ctotal[1C(33[1Cexisting[1C+[1C~14[1Cnew).
[1C4.[1C[94mnpm[1Crun[1Ctest:coverage[1C[39m—[1Cstill[1C100%[1Cacross[1C[94merrors.ts[39m,[1C[94mindex.ts[39m,[1C[94mpricing.ts[39m,[1C[94mtypes.ts[39m.
[1C5.[1CSanity-grep:[1C[94mgrep[1C-n[1C"weight"[1Csrc/pricing.ts[1C[39mshould[1Cshow[1Cthe[1Cconstant[1Ctable,[1Chelper,[1Cvalidator,[1Cand[1Cone[1Ccall[1Csite.[1CNo[1Caccidental[1Cduplication.
[37m╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌[39m

[100m  [97m- parcel type classification[39m                                                                                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- runtime validation[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                [49m
[100m  [97m- order total calculation[39m                                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 2 is implemented:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- optional speedy shipping[39m                                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- speedy shipping is an order-level adjustment line item[39m                                                                                                                                                            [49m
[100m  [97m- speedy shipping cost equals the parcel subtotal[39m                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- speedy shipping does not modify individual parcel line items[39m                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 3 is implemented:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- each parcel has required weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- weight limits exist for each parcel type[39m                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- overweight charges are added to individual parcel line item costs[39m                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97m- partial kilograms over the limit are rounded up[39m                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mStep 4 requirement:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                 [49m
[100m  [97mA new parcel type has been added to address excessive overweight charges.[39m                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mRules:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                                              [49m
[100m  [97m- Heavy parcel costs $50 up to and including 50kg[39m                                                                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- Heavy parcel costs $50 + $1/kg over 50kg[39m                                                                                                                                                                          [49m
[100m  [97m- The cheapest option for sending each parcel should be selected[39m                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97mImplementation expectations:[39m                                                                                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- Add Heavy as a parcel type[39m                                                                                                                                                                                        [49m
[100m  [97m- Heavy parcel pricing is based on weight[39m                                                                                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- Keep existing parcel pricing behaviour intact[39m                                                                                                                                                                     [49m
[100m  [97m- For each parcel, calculate the normal dimension-based parcel price including overweight charges[39m                                                                                                                   [49m
[100m  [97m- Also calculate the Heavy parcel price[39m                                                                                                                                                                             [49m
[100m  [97m- Select the cheaper option for that parcel[39m                                                                                                                                                                         [49m
[100m  [97m- If Heavy is cheaper, the parcel line item type should be Heavy[39m                                                                                                                                                    [49m
[100m  [97m- If the normal dimension-based option is cheaper, keep the normal parcel type[39m                                                                                                                                      [49m
[100m  [97m- Speedy shipping, if selected, should be calculated after the final parcel line item prices are selected[39m                                                                                                           [49m
[100m  [97m- Partial kilograms over 50kg should be rounded up[39m                                                                                                                                                                  [49m
[100m                                                                                                                                                                                                                      [49m

[1CPer[1Cyour[1Cchoice,[1CHEAVY[1Clives[1Cin[1Ca[1Cnew[1C[94mPARCEL_PRICING_PATH[1C[39mregistry[1Cthat[1Cmirrors[1C[94mPARCEL_SIZE[1C[39m/[1C[94mORDER_ADDON[39m.[1C[94mclassifyParcel[1C[39mkeeps[1Creturning[1C[94mParcelSize[1C[39m(truthful[1C—[1Cdimensions[1Cnever[1Cclassify[1Cas[1CHEAVY);[1C[94mPARCEL_PRICES[39m
[1Ckeeps[1Cits[1Cexisting[1Ckey[1Cset[1C(truthful[1C—[1CHeavy[1Cisn't[1Ca[1Cfixed[1Cprice).[1CHEAVY[1Cis[1Cselected[1Cat[1Cthe[1Cpricing[1Cstage,[1Cnot[1Cthe[1Cclassification[1Cstage.

[1C[1mApproach[22m

[1C[1mTypes[1C([94msrc/types.ts[39m)[22m

[1CAdd[1Cthe[1Cnew[1Cregistry[1Calongside[1C[94mPARCEL_SIZE[1C[39mand[1C[94mORDER_ADDON[39m,[1Cand[1Cwiden[1C[94mLineItemType[39m:

[1C[34mexport[1Cconst[1C[39mPARCEL_PRICING_PATH[1C=[1C{
[3C[36mHEAVY[39m:[1C[31m'HEAVY'[39m,
[1C}[1C[34mas[1Cconst[39m;
[1C[34mexport[1Ctype[1C[39mParcelPricingPath[1C=
[3C([34mtypeof[1C[39mPARCEL_PRICING_PATH)[keyof[1C[34mtypeof[1C[39mPARCEL_PRICING_PATH];

[1C[34mexport[1Ctype[1C[39mLineItemType[1C=[1CParcelSize[1C|[1CParcelPricingPath[1C|[1COrderAddon;

[1C[94mPricedLineItem.type[1C[39malready[1Creferences[1C[94mLineItemType[39m,[1Cso[1Cit[1Cwidens[1Cautomatically.[1C[94mParcel[39m,[1C[94mOrder[39m,[1C[94mOrderPricingResult[39m,[1C[94mPARCEL_SIZE[39m,[1C[94mORDER_ADDON[39m,[1C[94mParcelSize[39m,[1C[94mOrderAddon[1C[39mare[1Call[1Cunchanged.

[1C[1mPricing[1C([94msrc/pricing.ts[39m)[22m

[1CThree[1Cnew[1Cconstants[1Cnext[1Cto[1Cthe[1Cexisting[1Cpricing[1Ctables:

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mHEAVY_BASE_PRICE[1C=[1C[32m50[39m;
[1C[34mconst[1C[39mHEAVY_BASE_WEIGHT_LIMIT_KG[1C=[1C[32m50[39m;
[1C[34mconst[1C[39mHEAVY_OVER_RATE_PER_KG[1C=[1C[32m1[39m;

[1CA[1Csmall[1Chelper[1Cfor[1Cthe[1CHeavy[1Cformula:

[1C[34mfunction[33m [39mheavyParcelPrice(weightKg:[1C[36mnumber[39m):[1Cnumber[1C{
[3C[34mconst[1C[39mexcess[1C=[1C[36mMath[39m.max([32m0[39m,[1CweightKg[1C-[1CHEAVY_BASE_WEIGHT_LIMIT_KG);
[3C[34mreturn[1C[39mHEAVY_BASE_PRICE[1C+[1C[36mMath[39m.ceil(excess)[1C*[1CHEAVY_OVER_RATE_PER_KG;
[1C}

[1CSelection[1Cinside[1C[94mpriceOrder[1C[39m—[1Creplace[1Cthe[1Cparcel-line-item[1Cconstruction:

[1C[34mconst[1C[39mparcelLineItems:[1CPricedLineItem[][1C=[1Corder.parcels.map([33m([39mparcel)[1C=>[1C{
[3C[34mconst[1C[39msize[1C=[1CclassifyParcel(parcel);
[3C[34mconst[1C[39mnormalCost[1C=
[5CPARCEL_PRICES[size][1C+[1CoverweightCharge(parcel.weight,[1Csize);
[3C[34mconst[1C[39mheavyCost[1C=[1CheavyParcelPrice(parcel.weight);

[3C[34mif[1C[39m(heavyCost[1C<[1CnormalCost)[1C{
[5C[34mreturn[1C[39m{[1C[36mtype[39m:[1CPARCEL_PRICING_PATH.HEAVY,[1C[36mcost[39m:[1CheavyCost[1C};
[3C}
[3C[34mreturn[1C[39m{[1C[36mtype[39m:[1Csize,[1C[36mcost[39m:[1CnormalCost[1C};
[1C});

[1C[1mTie-breaking:[1C[22mstrict[1C[94m<[1C[39mmeans[1Cties[1Cgo[1Cto[1Cthe[1Cdimension-based[1Clabel.[1CIf[1Ca[1CSMALL[1Cparcel[1Chappens[1Cto[1Ccost[1Cexactly[1C$50[1Cunder[1Cthe[1Cnormal[1Cpath,[1Cit[1Cstays[1CSMALL[1C—[1Cthe[1Cconsumer's[1Cexpectation[1Cis[1Cthe[1Cnatural[1Clabel[1Cunless
[1CHeavy[1Cis[1C[3mstrictly[1C[23mcheaper.[1CThe[1Cbrief[1Cis[1Csilent[1Con[1Cthis,[1Cbut[1Cit's[1Cthe[1Cless[1Csurprising[1Cdefault.

[1CEverything[1Cafter[1Cthe[1Cparcel[1Cloop[1C—[1C[94mparcelSubtotal[39m,[1Cspeedy[1Cline[1Citem[1Cappend,[1C[94mtotal[1C[39m—[1Cis[1Cunchanged.[1CSpeedy[1Ccorrectness[1Cfalls[1Cout[1Cfor[1Cfree:[1Cthe[1Csubtotal[1Calready[1Creads[1Cfrom[1Cwhichever[1Cpath[1Cwon.
