[1C##[1CArchitecture
[1C<src/[1Clayout:[1Ctypes.ts[1C/[1Cpricing.ts[1C/[1Cerrors.ts[1C/[1Cindex.ts[1Cand[1Cwhat[1Ceach[1Cholds;

[1C##[1CPricing[1Cflow
[1C<numbered:[1C1)[1Cvalidate;[1C2)[1Cper[1Cparcel[1C—[1Cclassify[1Cby[1Clargest[1Cdimension,[1Ccompute
[1Cnormal[1Ccost[1C(base[1C+[1Coverweight[1Csurcharge),[1Ccompute[1CHeavy[1Ccost,[1Cpick[1Ccheaper
[1C(ties[1Cfavour[1Cthe[1Cdimension-based[1Clabel);[1C3)[1Cif[1CspeedyShipping,[1Cappend[1Cspeedy
[1Cline[1Citem[1C=[1Cparcel[1Csubtotal;[1C4)[1Ctotal[1C=[1Csum[1Cof[1Call[1Cline[1Citems.>

[1C##[1CValidation

[1C##[1CTradeoffs[1C/[1CDesign[1CDecisions
[1C-[1CThree[1Cregistries[1C(PARCEL_SIZE[1C/[1CPARCEL_RATE_TYPE[1C/[1CORDER_ADDON)[1Cinstead[1Cof
[3Cone[1C—[1Ckeeps[1CclassifyParcel's[1Creturn[1Ctype[1Cand[1CPARCEL_PRICES'[1Ckey[1Cset[1Chonest.
[1C-[1CHeavy[1Cselection[1Cuses[1Cstrict[1C<[1C—[1Cties[1Cgo[1Cto[1Cthe[1Cdimension-based[1Clabel.
[1C-[1COverweight[1Ccharge[1Cfolds[1Cinto[1Cthe[1Cparcel[1Cline[1Citem's[1Ccost,[1Cnot[1Ca[1Cseparate
[3Cline[1Citem.
[1C-[1CspeedyShipping[1Cis[1Ca[1Cbare[1Coptional[1Cboolean[1Con[1COrder,[1Cnot[1Ca[1Cnested[1Caddons
[3Cobject[1C—[1Cone[1Caddon[1Cdoesn't[1Cjustify[1Cthe[1Cwrapper[1Cyet.
[1C-[1CvalidateDimension[1Cand[1CvalidateWeight[1Crepeat[1Cthe[1Cpredicate[1Crather[1Cthan
[3Csharing[1Cone[1C—[1Ctheir[1Ctwo[1Cfailure[1Cmessages[1Cmust[1Cremain[1Cdistinct[1Cand[1Cexisting
[3Ctests[1Cassert[1Con[1Cthe[1Cexact[1Ctext.

[1C##[1CFuture[1CImprovements
[1C-[1CReplace[1Cthe[1Cnumeric[1Ccost[1Cwith[1Ca[1Ctyped[1CMoney[1Cvalue[1Ccarrying[1Ccurrency.
[1C-[1CSurface[1Ca[1Ccost[1Cbreakdown[1C(base[1C/[1Coverweight[1C/[1Cheavy[1C/[1Cspeedy)[1Con[1Ceach[1Cline
[3Citem[1Cfor[1Cconsumers[1Cthat[1Cneed[1Ctransparency[1Cwithout[1Cinspecting[1C`type`.
[1C-[1CMove[1Cpricing[1Ctables[1C(sizes,[1Climits,[1Crates)[1Cto[1Cconfiguration[1Cto[1Csupport
[3Cper-region[1Ctariffs.
[1C-[1CAdopt[1Ca[1Cschema-based[1Cvalidator[1C(e.g.[1Czod)[1Cif[1Cthe[1Cinput[1Ccontract[1Cgrows.

[1C[1mThings[1Cthat[1Cwill[1Cnot[1Cchange[22m

[1C##[1CScripts

[1C##[1CArchitecture

[1C##[1CPricing[1Cflow
[1C<numbered[1Cprose:[1C1)[1Cvalidate;[1C2)[1Cper[1Cparcel[1C—[1Cclassify[1Cby[1Clargest[1Cdimension,
[1Ccompute[1Cnormal[1Ccost[1C(base[1C+[1Coverweight[1Csurcharge),[1Ccompute[1CHeavy[1Ccost,[1Cpick
[1Ccheaper[1C(ties[1Cfavour[1Cthe[1Cdimension-based[1Clabel);[1C3)[1Cif[1CspeedyShipping,[1Cappend
[1Cspeedy[1Cline[1Citem[1C=[1Cparcel[1Csubtotal;[1C4)[1Ctotal[1C=[1Csum[1Cof[1Call[1Cline[1Citems.>

[1C<plus[1Ctwo[1CMermaid[1Ccharts[1Cfollowing[1CCLAUDE.md[1Crules:[1Csimple[1Cnode[1Clabels,[1Cno
[1Cspecial[1Ccharacters,[1C"to/equals/plus"[1Cinstead[1Cof[1Carrows/=/+[1Cinside[1Clabels.>

[1C```mermaid
[1Cflowchart[1CTD
[5CA[priceOrder[1Ccalled][1C-->[1CB[Validate[1Corder]
[5CB[1C-->[1CC[For[1Ceach[1Cparcel]
[5CC[1C-->[1CD[Classify[1Cby[1Clargest[1Cdimension]
[5CD[1C-->[1CE[Compute[1Cnormal[1Ccost[1Cbase[1Cplus[1Coverweight]

[5CF[1C-->[1CG
[5CG[1C-->|Yes|[1CH[Line[1Citem[1Ctype[1CHeavy]
[5CG[1C-->|No|[1CI[Line[1Citem[1Ctype[1CSize]
[5CH[1C-->[1CJ[Parcel[1Csubtotal]
[5CI[1C-->[1CJ
[5CJ[1C-->[1CK{Speedy[1Cshipping?}
[5CK[1C-->|Yes|[1CL[Append[1Cspeedy[1Cline[1Citem[1Cequal[1Cto[1Csubtotal]
[5CK[1C-->|No|[1CM[Total[1Cequals[1Csubtotal]
[5CL[1C-->[1CN[Total[1Cequals[1Csubtotal[1Ctimes[1Ctwo]

[1Cflowchart[1CTD
[5CA[Largest[1Cdimension][1C-->[1CB{Under[1C10cm?}
[5CB[1C-->|Yes|[1CC[Small]
[5CB[1C-->|No|[1CD{Under[1C50cm?}
[5CD[1C-->|Yes|[1CE[Medium]
[5CD[1C-->|No|[1CF{Under[1C100cm?}
[5CF[1C-->|Yes|[1CG[Large]
